compatibility_rules: canonical module names remain stable within major version 1
capability identifiers remain stable within major version 1
new exported APIs may be added without renaming existing modules
layering violations are rejected at the checked-in workspace boundary
advanced helper families remain owned by their current canonical modules within major version 1
strict-system helper exposure remains profile-gated and cannot be widened into core claims without an explicit contract update
breaking_change_rules: moving an api family between canonical modules is a major-version change
changing a required profile gate for an existing canonical module is a major-version change
removing a required export from the checked-in architecture contracts is a major-version change
